LAW AND MOTION 301, DEFENDANT GREG GILKEY'S MOTION TO VACATE VOID JUDGMENT FOR LACK OF OR IMPROPER SERVICE OF SUMMONS IS GRANTED. IT IS APPARENT THAT PLAINTIFF DID NOT USE REASONABLE DILIGENCE IN ATTEMPTING TO SERVE DEFENDANT PERSONALLY AND EVEN IF PLAINTIFF HAD, THE ADDRESS TO WHICH PLAINTIFF CLAIMS TO HAVE DELIVERED AND MAILED THE SUMMONS WAS NOT DEFENDANT'S OFFICE, DWELLING HOUSE, USUALLY PLACE OF ABODE, OR USUAL MAILING ADDRESS AT THAT TIME. THEREFORE, SERVICE WAS NOT EFFECTIVE UNDER C C P SECTION 415.20 AND THAT JUDGMENT IS VACATED AS VOID PURSUANT TO C C P SECTION 473(D) BECAUSE THE COURT NEVER ACQUIRED JURISDICTION OVER DEFENDANT. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: CAROL KAREN, CSR # 8189

Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn For Order Compelling Answers To Interrogatories And For Production Of Documents And For Sanctions
Off Calendar Oct-30-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: NO APPEARANCE STATED. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Defendant GREG GILKEY's Motion To Compel Answers To Interrogatories And For Production Of Documents is granted as to Plaintiff John C. Gilkey. No opposition has been filed. Plaintiff is ordered to respond within 15 days of notice of this order. Plaintiff's failure to respond was a misuse of the discovery process. Sanctions are imposed against Plaintiff in the amount of $740, to be paid within 30 days of notice of this order. COMM: EVERETT A. HEWLETT

Notice Of Motion To Vacate Void Judgment For Lack Of Or Improper Service Of Smmons;
Off Calendar May-17-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES- ATTY. PHILIP S. KEITH, TEL. NO. 433-1790 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANT GREG GILKEY;
NO OTHER APPEARANCE ON THE MATTER.

RULING - THE COURT ADOPTED IT'S TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS -DEFENDANT GREG GILKEY'S Motion To Vacate Void Judgment For Lack Of Or Improper Service Of Summons IS GRANTED. IT IS APPARENT THAT PLAINTIFF DID NOT USE REASONABLE DILIGENCE IN ATTEMPTING TO SERVE DEFENDANT PERSONALLY AND EVEN IF PLAINTIFF HAD, THE ADDRESS TO WHICH PLAINTIFF CLAIMS TO HAVE DELIVERED AND MAILED THE SUMMONS WAS NOT DEFENDANT'S OFFICE, DWELLING HOUSE, USUALLY PLACE OF ABODE, OR USUAL MAILING ADDRESS AT THAT TIME. THEREFORE, SERVICE WAS NOT EFFECTIVE UNDER C C P SECTION 415.20 AND THAT JUDGMENT IS VACATED AS VOID PURSUANT TO C C P SECTION 473(D) BECAUSE THE COURT NEVER ACQUIRED JURISDICTION OVER DEFENDANT. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR # 8189 =301/PJB/JF

Costs $58.00 for a total of $ 74,545.00.
